name: INVESCO DB BASE METALS FUND
business: Invesco DB Base Metals Fund is a series of Invesco DB Multi-Sector Commodity Trust that seeks to track changes in the level of the DBIQ Optimum Yield Industrial Metals Index Excess Return by investing in futures contracts on base metals such as aluminum, zinc, lead, nickel, and copper. The fund offers shares only to eligible financial institutions, known as Authorized Participants, in creation units of 50,000 shares.

exposures.sentence: Effective November 10, 2025, the Index comprised the following commodities: Aluminum, Zinc, Lead, Nickel, Comex Copper and Copper Grade A (each, an Index Commodity, and collectively, the Index Commodities).
